svg.title: ProcurAI — Information Architecture: PR Detail Page — All 7 Tabs
svg.desc: Column-structured IA diagram showing the PR Detail Page with all 7 tabs: Overview, Sourcing (Routine and Complex paths), Proposals, Evaluation, SoW and Contract, Purchase Order, and Activity and Audit.

g.text: PR Detail Page — Header (persistent): PR ID · Title · Creator · Date · Lifecycle stage progress · Status badge · AI classification · SLA indicator · Edit / Cancel / Export
Overview + Activity: always visible | Sourcing: after PR approved | Proposals: Complex only, after RFP approved | Evaluation: after min. 1 extraction complete
SoW & Contract: after vendor finalized | Purchase Order: after signed SoW uploaded

svg.text: Purple header bar = persistent PR header across all tabs
